title: economics: add BYOP+DevShare dashboard, split apps/dev views
author: ElliotEtag
pr_body_excerpt:
Restructures the economics dashboards around clean BYOP signals (post `byop-client-key-id` migration) and the new DevShare rollout.

**New** — `byop-devshare.json`
- Clean BYOP: filter on `api_key_client_id != ''` (parent-pk tracked). Stats, daily Pollen split pack/tier, top apps + top developers with d1_apikey/d1_user joins, app growth, end-user tier composition.
- DevShare: filter on `markup_rate > 0 AND total_price > dev_price`. Earnings stats, daily payout by meter, top earning devs/apps, eligible-but-not-earning opportunity table.
- Legacy/Heuristic: minimal migration-health section (events without parent-pk tracking — should trend to zero).
- Diagnostics: weekly clean-vs-legacy signal coverage.

**New** — `developer-leaderboard.json`
- All-platform developer ranking with apps-per-dev (one dev, many apps), pack/tier split, BYOP flag, SK/PK key counts.
- Apps-per-dev distribution and a polymaths panel (devs ranked by app count, not money).

**Refined** — `app-ecosystem.json`
- Drops the BYOP user-count tiles (redundant with `byop-devshare`).
- Adds **Top Apps by Pollen** (directory apps ranked, attribution via user_github_id = directory submitter).
- Adds **BYOP-Detected Directory Apps** drill-down (attribution via `api_key_created_for_user_id → d1_user.github_id → app_directory.github_user_id`, which surfaces end-user spend correctly for BYOP).

**Removed** — `app-leaderboard.json`
- BYOP content moved to `byop-devshare`, dev content to `developer-leaderboard`. The remaining hybrid was redundant.

**Conventions**
- All three new/touched dashboards add a `${bucket}` template variable (Hourly / Daily / Weekly / Monthly, defaults to Daily) used in `toStartOfInterval(start_time, INTERVAL ${bucket})` across every timeseries.
- All default to `now-7d`.
- Standard banned-users CTE + Dec-30/Jan-8 data-gap exclusion preserved.

Already deployed to `economics.myceli.ai` via scp — this PR brings git in sync.

gist.headline: Tracking the honey
gist.blurb: We've completely revamped our internal economics dashboards to track BYOP and the new DevShare rollout. Better visibility means better support for our developer ecosystem.
gist.summary: Restructured the internal economics dashboards to track BYOP and DevShare metrics, adding byop-devshare and developer-leaderboard views while refining the app-ecosystem dashboard.
gist.impact: This gives the core team clearer visibility into developer earnings, app growth, and BYOP adoption across the platform.
